name: Parsio API
description: Parsio is an AI-powered document and email parser that extracts structured data from PDFs, emails, spreadsheets, and other documents. The API allows you to programmatically manage mailboxes, upload documents for parsing, retrieve parsed data, and configure webhooks for real-time data delivery.
